attempts.prompt:
## Better Together identity exploration - Round 4 app icon
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app-icon source, straight-on, centered, and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people intentionally tending one living relationship.
- Audience: modern couples who want an emotionally intelligent relationship app, not a therapy clinic or wedding product.
- Style: premium editorial wellness identity; confident, memorable, warm, and modern; crisp flat vector-master geometry with a slight human-cut irregularity; no photorealism.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition: one dominant centered silhouette; 18 percent optical safe margin; two to five foreground groups; strong contrast and readable geometry at 20 px.
- Source requirements: TRUE full-bleed square background with every corner filled; NO pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, inset tile, transparency, mockup, device, label, caption, or presentation board.
- Originality: create an original Better Together identity. Do not imitate or reproduce any competitor, trademark, or existing app icon.
- NO gradients, glow, bevel, 3D, shadows, stock-icon finish, scenery, landscape, literal people, faces, hands, infinity sign, chain link, puzzle pieces, wedding rings, butterfly, wings, yin-yang, or decorative border.
- Text rule: when the direction requests letters, render ONLY the exact uppercase letters "BT". When the direction does not request letters, render NO text.

Use the attached Better Together reference only to preserve the warm palette, confident organic edge character, and visual simplicity. Do not duplicate its ring, plant, person-like stems, proportions, or composition.

## Direction - Rooted BT
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: two unmistakable uppercase letters "BT" built as one compact bonsai-like structure inside the central 64 percent.
- Letter B: coral #E5533A at left, bold and clearly readable, with two blunt rounded counters. Its lower terminal extends into one short root.
- Letter T: deep forest #113B36 at right, bold and clearly readable. Its vertical stem extends downward into a second separate root.
- Growth detail: exactly three compact saffron #D99A3D leaf shapes grow directly from the upper T cap, arranged as one asymmetrical bonsai crown.
- Connection: one small deep-forest joining notch links the letters at mid-height; roots remain separate.
- MUST read as exact "BT" first and bonsai second.
- NO pot, soil line, landscape, generic tree silhouette, text beyond BT, heart, ring, crest, or decorative frame.

## Required correction

The previous render was rejected because: The new roots became starburst feet and still make the monogram look childish. Remove every visible root entirely. Build a clean premium BT monogram: coral B and forest T touching at one precise mid-height joint, with the T vertical functioning as the bonsai trunk. Grow exactly three substantial saffron leaves directly from the T cap. No root lines, feet, spikes, branch stubs, or detached shapes.

Correct that failure while preserving the named direction, palette, and app-icon composition. Produce a materially cleaner replacement.
